title: The Inbox Zero Screenshot
content: I hit inbox zero exactly once. December 31st, 2020. Screenshot it. Framed it. By January 2nd, I had 47 emails. The point isn't zero - it's managed.
extended_content: Everyone chases inbox zero like it's the holy grail. I did too. That one time I achieved it, I felt like I'd conquered the world. Forty-eight hours later, reality hit. The goal isn't empty - it's controlled. Now I aim for 'manageable.' Everything is either handled, scheduled, or deleted. The number doesn't matter. The feeling of control does.
when_to_tell: when someone is stressed about email volume
lesson: Perfection is the enemy of manageable
